description:
Operating Area: Indonesia

Come away with us:
the inky night sky dotted with stars, waves lapping against the shoreline, the unparalleled serenity of weaving through untouched islands aboard our custom-built yacht.

The bespoke private sailing experience on board a kaleidoscope of marine life amidst crystalline waters and pristine islands; in the evenings, feel the rhythm of the gentle ocean while gazing at the wonders of the celestial skies.

Activities include world-class diving, snorkeling, paddle boarding, kayaking, water-skiing, wakeboarding, birdwatching, private island- hopping, stargazing, private beach dinners,
 massage treatment sand nature hikes. Celestia sails to Raja Ampat, Komodo National Park, the Spice Islands and other destinations in Indonesia’s Coral Triangle.

Celestia is a 45 meter (148 foot) custom-designed phinisi yacht sailing the Indonesian archipelago, with 7 staterooms (accommodating 14 guests) and an in-house crew of 17. 
She is built by hand by the legendary Bulukumba boatbuilders, guided by centuries of UNESCO recognized traditions, modernized and reimagined by an experienced team at the helm.

crew.name: Dining Duti  Anggoro
crew.bio: Hailing from Banyuwangi, East Java, with 12 years of experience sailing across the Indonesian Seas, Dining has been a part of the crews of Amandira and Damai. With his local knowledge and unwavering confidence, he enjoys navigating through his home archipelago.

crew.name: Jennifer Tan
crew.bio: Originally from Penang/Lampung, our cruise director Jennifer knows how to make a very successful voyage. Jennifer has extensive knowledge of traditional Indonesian culture and a passion for wildlife and marine life. She will accompany you on excursions with enthusiasm and takes pride in ensuring the highest level of service possible. Thanks to her 11 years of practice, guests can be assured of the very best onboard experience.

crew.name: Adi Purnomo  Darwis
crew.bio: Originally from Sorong, Papua, our Chief Officer Adi Purnomo Darwis will be delighted in welcoming our passengers aboard. With his 6 years of experience working on Amandira & Salila, he will be nothing less than helpful in making your trip a memorable one.

crew.name: Ruslan Hasan
crew.bio: As the 2nd Officer of the crew, Ruslan from Sumbawa, NTB has 7 years of experience. Previously part of the Empress II crew, he is qualified to handle life aboard a vessel.

crew.name: Adi Sucipto
crew.bio: Formerly a crew member of Pindito, Adi has now 10 years of engineering experience in the yachting industry. Originally from Banyuwangi, East Java, Adi is now the Chief Engineer of Celestia and possesses more than enough knowledge to ensure the highest level of security for an ideal cruise across the magnificent Indonesian landscapes.

crew.name: Irfan Mahmud
crew.bio: Originally from Makassar, Sulawesi, Irfan is the 2nd Engineer onboard of Celestia. He has 5 years of working experience in the field, including his prior experience aboard Mutiara Laut.

crew.name: Abdul Halil
crew.bio: Assisting both Adi and Irfan, Abdul Halil is our 3rd Engineer. From Sidoarjo, East Java, Abdul has 5 years of training including cruises on Mischief.

crew.name: Syahruddin
crew.bio: Formerly part of Prana, our Oiler Syahruddin from Sorong, Papua, will be pleased to put his past 8 years of experience to the contribution of Celestia.

crew.name: Jufriadi
crew.bio:
Originating from the picturesque island of Sumbawa in West Nusa Tenggara, Jufriadi brings 10 years of seasoned expertise to Celestia Yacht. With a Navigation rating certification and a wealth of experience from prestigious vessels like Salila and Ombak Putih, Jufriadi ensures smooth and safe voyages through his adept navigation skills. His deep connection to the sea, honed over a 
decade, guarantees that every journey aboard Celestia is not only safe but also a captivating adventure.

crew.name: Jushaeri/Herry
crew.bio: Raised in Bulukumba, Sulawesi, Herry has been involved with Celestia since day one. With 6 years of experience on Dunia Baru and Tiare, Herry will put his woodworking skills and dedication to Celestia to ensure high-standard cruises.

crew.name: Andi Asmawan
crew.bio: With a wealth of maritime knowledge and a profound love for the sea, Andi Asmawan is a pivotal member of the Celestia Yacht crew. Specializing in deck operations, Andi’s meticulous attention to detail and expertise ensure every voyage is smooth and secure, allowing guests to immerse themselves in the serenity of their journey.

crew.name: Reginal Karel  Tamboto
crew.bio: From the vibrant region of Minahasa, Sulawesi, Reginal Karel Tamboto infuses Celestia with his exceptional culinary skills as our esteemed Head Chef. Working under the guidance of Celestia's Executive Chef, Chef Wayan, Reginal brings 6 years of specialized expertise on prestigious yachts like Prana and Oracle. Reginal's passion for creating unforgettable dining experiences elevates every journey, making each voyage with Celestia a gastronomic adventure.

crew.name: Youli Legi
crew.bio: Hailing from the scenic region of Minahasa in Sulawesi, famous for its bold and fragrant spices cuisine, Youli Legi brings 6 years of culinary expertise to Celestia Yacht. Youli combines technical proficiency with his deep passion for the culinary arts.

crew.name: Normans  Karisoh
crew.bio: A native of Minahasa, Sulawesi, Normans Karisoh enriches Celestia Yacht with 9 years of distinguished experience in maritime hospitality. With a Seaman's book (BST) certification and a background from prestigious vessels like Mutiara Laut, Aliikai, and Aurora, Normans is dedicated to service excellence and meticulous attention to detail. His warm and professional approach ensures a haven of luxury and comfort for our guests. Normans' commitment to creating an exceptional guest experience elevates every journey aboard Celestia Yacht, making it truly unforgettable.

crew.name: Endang Wati  Odeh
crew.bio: Exemplifying hospitality at its finest, Endang wati Ode serves as our esteemed Stewardess on Celestia. With 5 years of refined experience in hospitality industry. Endang’s dedication to guest satisfaction and her meticulous attention to detail ensure every journey is marked by unparalleled elegance and tranquility.

crew.name: Bella Dwi  Wahyuni
crew.bio: Infusing every therapy session with a blend of traditional and contemporary wellness practices, Gusti Rasmita is our esteemed Therapist aboard Celestia Yacht. Her deep understanding of holistic healing, rooted in her Balinese heritage, ensures guests experience unparalleled relaxation and rejuvenation. Gusti’s dedication to well-being and her soothing techniques create a sanctuary of tranquility for everyone on board.

crew.name: Bartholomeus  Bal Rahawarin
crew.bio: With a wealth of maritime knowledge and a profound love for the sea, Andi Asmawan is a pivotal member of the Celestia Yacht crew. Specializing in deck operations, Andi’s meticulous attention to detail and expertise ensure every voyage is smooth and secure, allowing guests to immerse themselves in the serenity of their journey.
